content: Official Art-Net 4 revision 1.4dp defines ArtDmx sequence 1 through 255 with zero disabling ordering, a 15-bit Port-Address, even payload length 2 through 512, subscriber unicast, regular ArtPoll discovery, gateway refresh limits up to 44 Hz for DMX512, and 800 to 1000 ms recommended unchanged-data retransmit. ArtSync changes node buffering behavior and times out after four seconds.
